codeReview.summary: The implementation in commit e5391d7 satisfies the feature description and expected behaviors for /admin/articles: server-side fetch with query params, required columns (including bulk-select checkbox), sort toggles, search filtering, pagination controls, Add Article link, empty states, and display badges. I found no blocking or non-blocking defects relative to VAL-ART-001 through VAL-ART-006.

summary: Reviewed the feature entry, handoff, transcript skeleton, full commit diff, and relevant shared-state docs. articles-admin-grid is implemented as specified and passes scrutiny with no issues identified.
